summary: Applied UI-only polish per constraint (no feature/logic changes): refined the P0/P1/P2 status presentation in Statistics from a generic snapshot to a clearer stage board with descriptive phase labels, and updated Settings->Stats phase summary copy for readability. Existing behavior and data logic remain unchanged.
risks: UI text is now more explicit and slightly longer; very small screens may wrap the phase chips to multiple lines (expected responsive behavior).
suggested_tests: Open Setup -> Stats and verify the P0/P1/P2 section renders with the new stage-board labels and unchanged status values.
Open Settings -> Stats and verify the phase summary line uses the new wording while preserving the same status indicators.
Run `npm run build` in /Users/williamai/projects/vocabspark to confirm no regression (validated in this run).
